flags.description: Master enforcer switch. Off = allow every operation regardless of cap. NEVER OFF in production except during a billing incident.
ExportUsageForBillingJob execution. Off during Stripe outages to prevent duplicate usage records on retry.
Dispatch of QuotaApproachingNotification. Off during notification-fatigue windows.
Off = every enforcement goes to Postgres. Emergency fallback if Redis has issues.

Fail-open policy when Redis is unreachable OR the hot-path returns an error. Off (default) = fail closed — refuse the metered operation with EntitlementCheckFailed. On = fail open — allow the operation, emit `stackra.entitlement.fail_open_total{key,reason}` metric, log a WARN record. Turn on during incident triage when refusing operations is more costly than temporarily over-serving. NEVER leave on outside a declared incident — documented fail-open windows must be logged in the incident retro.

modes.off: Fail closed. Redis outage → EntitlementCheckFailed (retryable). Every consumer catches + surfaces `503 Service Unavailable` to callers. Correctness > availability.
modes.on: Fail open. Redis outage → operation permitted + stackra.entitlement.fail_open_total increments. Availability > correctness for the outage window.

flags.escalation: Alert routed to on-call SRE when metric exceeds 100 events/minute; auto-page above 1000 events/minute. Auto-disable after 60 minutes to prevent accidental extended fail-open state.
